title: Hash Tables, Dictionaries, Sets, and Collision Policy · Structure Brief: Dict Set Modeling
summary: Create a deduplication and lookup service that remains correct under collision-heavy data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa dict set modeling increment in a hash-table model and workload benchmark. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use dictionaries, sets, counters, and default mappings according to semantic need.
Explain how load factor and resizing influence expected cost and memory.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
